headline: How The Amphenol (APH) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Fair Value Assumptions
summary: Amphenol’s updated fair value estimate now stands at US$178.39 per share, compared with the previous US$169.44, putting fresh focus on where price targets are settling. Recent Street research has split between analysts raising targets on confidence in execution and those trimming or tempering shorter term conviction after reassessing growth and margin assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit together and what to watch to keep up with the evolving story around the...

headline: JPMorganChase Files Form 10-Q for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, May 01, 2026--JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) ("JPMorganChase" or the "Firm") has filed its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 with the SEC. The report is available on the SEC's website at https://www.sec.gov and will be available on the Firm's Investor Relations website at https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir under SEC Filings & Other Disclosures.

headline: Market is complacent, but that can change 'very quickly': Analyst
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) open Friday's session higher after a busy week of earnings from Big Tech, most recently Apple's (AAPL) strong second quarter results reported yesterday. Sevens Report Research founder Tom Essaye joins Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi on the Opening Bid panel to discuss the market's latest drivers as 80% of S&P 500 companies have beaten earnings estimates with a reported 31% average growth year-over-year.

headline: Why The Narrative Around iRhythm Holdings (IRTC) Is Shifting After Valuation And DOJ Updates
summary: The blended fair value estimate for iRhythm Holdings has been trimmed from US$199.57 to US$195.00, a modest reset that reflects updated modeling assumptions rather than a wholesale rewrite of the story. Many recent price target moves from firms such as JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs tie back to sector wide multiple compression and ongoing Department of Justice related overhangs, even as several analysts keep generally positive ratings on the stock. As you read on, you will see how these shifting...
